news.headline: Damien Perriman named CCO at eXoZymes, a veteran in biomanufacturing, bringing valuable experience to the team.
Old National Bancorp (NASDAQ: ONB) sets schedule for Q1 2025 earnings release and conference call on April 2.
news.summary: Evansville, Indiana - In a recent announcement on April 2, 2025, Old National Bancorp (NASDAQ: ONB) disclosed the upcoming details for its first-quarter 2025 financial results release and conference call. Old National Bancorp, the parent entity of Old National Bank, will be sharing its earnings report and conducting a conference call according to the following schedule.

news.headline: Trump: Jobs and factories will come back.
Fluor will offer EPCM services for another multi-billion-dollar pharmaceutical facility in Indiana.
news.summary: IRVING, Texas-- Fluor Corporation has been selected to offer engineering, procurement, construction, and management (EPCM) services for a second massive pharmaceutical facility being constructed in Indiana. The project will involve an investment of multiple billions of dollars and marks Fluor's ongoing commitment to building a better world through its specialized services.

news.headline: Trump: There will be lower prices for consumers.
Grid Dynamics (Nasdaq: GDYN) will discuss Q1 2025 financial results in video call on May 1 at 4:30 p.m. ET. Webcast also available.
news.summary: A company based in San Ramon, California, Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN), known for its enterprise-level digital transformation services, will conduct a video conference call on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET to communicate its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. Interested parties can access a press release outlining the results on the company's website before the call. The video conference will be webcasted, and a replay will be accessible subsequently.

news.headline: Penguin Solutions announces Q2 fiscal 2025 results; COO Jack Pacheco to retire. #financialnews
news.summary: A technology company based in Milpitas, California, Penguin Solutions, released their financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. Additionally, they announced the upcoming retirement of Jack Pacheco, the COO and President of Integrated Memory within the company.

news.headline: RLI Transportation partners with TruckerCloud in Peoria, Ill., for commercial transportation services.
news.summary: A collaboration has been revealed between RLI Transportation, a sector of RLI Insurance Company based in Peoria, Illinois, and TruckerCloud in the domain of commercial transportation. This partnership is set to bring about substantial advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Riverbed will launch AI-powered observability solutions in April; bookings up 102% in Q1 '25.
news.summary: Riverbed, a leading provider of AIOps for observability, will introduce groundbreaking AI innovations and fresh data observability solutions during a Global Webcast scheduled for April 8 in the Americas and EMEA regions, and April 9 in APJ. Interested participants can sign up for the Webcast through the provided link. These upcoming solutions aim to enhance the existing Riverbed Platform, further capitalizing on the company's success in the market. Notably, Riverbed observability bookings have shown substantial growth.

news.headline: Trump: I will sign an executive order for reciprocal tariffs.
Trump: We will implement reciprocal tariffs. They do it to us, we do it to them.
Starbucks declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.61 per share, payable on May 30, 2025, to shareholders of record on May 16.
news.summary: In Seattle, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.61 per share for its outstanding Common Stock. The dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be paid out in cash on May 30, 2025, to shareholders listed on the record as of May 16, 2025. Starbucks, established in 1971, focuses on ethically sourcing and roasting top-notch arabica coffee. With over 40,000 locations globally, it stands as a leading coffee company.

news.headline: RH reports Q4 & fiscal year 2024 results, ended Feb 1, 2025. Live conference call at 2 pm PT (5 pm ET) today.
news.summary: RH, a company listed on the NYSE as RH, recently disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on February 1, 2025. The shareholder letter from Chairman and CEO, Gary Friedman, can be found on the Investor Relations section of the website at ir.rh.com. Furthermore, RH will conduct a live conference call and audio webcast at 2:00 pm Pacific Time (5:00 pm Eastern Time) today. For further details and access to the call, individuals can visit the aforementioned website.

news.headline: Grand Prix ACF AutoTech announces winners for 8th Annual Contest in Paris, including TETMET, Abiliz, and H2Gremm.
news.summary: In Paris, the Grand Prix ACF AutoTech accelerator has revealed the victors of its 8th annual competition, recognizing leading automotive startups worldwide. TETMET clinched the top prize, the Grand Prix ACF Award, while Abiliz secured the Prix Pionnier ACF Award and H2Gremm grabbed the Mention GPACF GreenTech Award. The awards ceremony took place in Paris on April 2nd.

news.headline: PennantPark Investment Corp. to pay $0.08/share monthly distribution on May 1, 2025 to record stockholders by April 15, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, PennantPark Investment Corporation (NYSE: PNNT) announced a monthly distribution of $0.08 per share for April 2025. The distribution is set to be paid on May 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2025. It is anticipated to be sourced from taxable net investment income. Specific tax details will be provided to shareholders on Form 1099 after the close of the calendar year and in the Company's periodic report submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Pioneer Power hosting conference call on April 15, 2025 at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss 2024 financial results.
news.summary: Headquartered in Fort Lee, New Jersey, Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) revealed plans to hold a conference call on April 15, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to delve into Pioneer's financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Pioneer specializes in designing, manufacturing, servicing, and integrating distributed energy resources, power generation equipment, and mobile EV charging solutions. The event will be open for discussions with the investment community.

news.headline: "Brazil's new project targets world's tallest residential tower, challenging Dubai. #Skyscraper #Brazil"
NeuroPace to end SEEG distribution in Q4 2025, maintains revenue guidance for 2025.
news.summary: Commencing in the fourth quarter of 2025, the distribution partnership for Stereo Electroencephalography (SEEG) will be phased out. Despite this, the revenue guidance for 2025 will still be upheld.

news.headline: BBSI names Thomas McGinn as Senior VP of Insurance, to oversee operations, including underwriting and risk management.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Washington on April 2, 2025, Barrett Business Services, Inc. (BBSI), listed on NASDAQ as BBSI, revealed the selection of Thomas McGinn as the Senior Vice President of Insurance. Mr. McGinn will manage BBSI's insurance functions, covering underwriting strategy, risk management, and pricing, under the supervision of CEO Gary Kramer.

news.headline: eXoZymes releases Q4 and full-year 2024 update.
Terns Pharmaceuticals awarded equity to 2 new employees as inducement grant under Nasdaq Rule 5635(C)(4).
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Foster City, California, revealed that it provided an equity inducement award to two new employees on April 1, 2025, under the 2022 Employment Inducement Award Plan. This clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed on Nasdaq as TERN, is focused on developing small-molecule products for oncology and obesity treatments. The Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors approved these equity awards in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The inducements were crucial in attracting the new employees to join Terns.

news.headline: Lam Research Corp (NASDAQ: LRCX) to hold financial conference call on April 23, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PDT (5:00 p.m. EDT).
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Fremont, California, Lam Research Corp. disclosed plans for a quarterly financial conference call and webcast scheduled for April 23, 2025. The event will commence at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Daylight Saving Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time). Lam Research Corp. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LRCX.

news.headline: Safe Bulkers, Inc. declares quarterly dividends on 8.00% Series C and D preferred shares.
news.summary: Safe Bulkers, Inc., a leading global provider of marine drybulk transportation services, recently revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a significant declaration. This announcement was made on April 2, 2025, and the Company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange as SB.

news.headline: Curis to present at healthcare conference in April; focusing on developing emavusertib, IRAK4 inhibitor. James Dentzer to lead.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Lexington, Massachusetts, Curis, Inc. disclosed that James Dentzer, the President and CEO, mentioned the company's focus on advancing emavusertib (CA-4948), an orally administered small molecule IRAK4 inhibitor. Curis, Inc. operates under the NASDAQ ticker symbol CRIS.

news.headline: Trinity Capital Inc. invests $68.75 million in growth capital to CMR Surgical, a global medical devices company.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN), a prominent alternative asset manager, revealed its plan to provide CMR Surgical, a global medical devices firm focused on revolutionizing surgery, with a substantial investment of up to $68.75 million in growth capital.

news.headline: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners will host Q1 2025 results call on April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners has announced that their Q1 2025 conference call and webcast is scheduled for April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Stocks surge as Dow closes up 235 points before Trump's tariff news.
GigaCloud increases share repurchase program by $16 million, bringing total authorization to $62 million.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, GigaCloud Technology Inc (Nasdaq: GCT) revealed plans to bolster its Class A ordinary share repurchase initiative. The Board of Directors gave the green light on March 28, 2025, adding $16 million to the existing program, which now stands at $62 million compared to the initial $46 million. This move extends the program until August 28, 2025. GigaCloud specializes in creating global end-to-end B2B ecommerce technology solutions tailored for substantial merchandise delivery.

news.headline: Plexium presents at AACR meeting with two oral presentations and multiple posters on PLX-4545, a molecular degrader.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in San Diego, Plexium, Inc. revealed the latest updates on their Phase 1 clinical trial of PLX-4545, a specialized IKZF2 molecular glue degrader. Plexium is a prominent company in the field of targeted protein degradation. The report included the preliminary findings from the clinical trial, suggesting progress with the experimental drug. Additionally, Plexium presented noteworthy preclinical results from their ongoing research endeavors. These developments indicate a promising future for Plexium and their innovative approach to protein targeting therapy.

news.headline: GRI Bio closes $5.0 million public offering, selling 1,388,888 shares at $3.60/share with Series Warrants.
news.summary: GRI Bio, Inc., a biotechnology company, recently concluded a public offering of 1,388,888 shares of its common stock with accompanying warrants. The offering included Series E-1 warrants for 1,388,888 common stock shares, Series E-2 warrants for 1,388,888 shares, and Series E-3 warrants for the same amount. The public offering was priced at $3.60 per share, with the Series Warrants having an exercise price of $3.20 per share and varying expiration dates – the Series E-1 warrants expire in five years, while the short-term E-2 and E-3 warrants expire in eighteen and nine months respectively.

news.headline: Lucid Group announces Q1 production and deliveries, producing 2,212 vehicles and over 600 deliveries in March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Newark, California, on April 2, 2025, Lucid Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID), a leading manufacturer of cutting-edge electric vehicles, revealed the production and delivery results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. Over this span, Lucid successfully manufactured 2,212 vehicles and additionally distributed more than 600 units...

news.headline: Compass Therapeutics (Nasdaq: CMPX) to participate in Stifel 2025 Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum on April 8-9. #biopharma
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Boston, Compass Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CMPX), a biopharmaceutical company, revealed plans to speak at the Stifel 2025 Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum on April 8-9, 2025. Compass is a clinical-stage company concentrating on oncology, creating antibody-based treatments for various diseases. The event will serve as a platform for the company to present its developments, targeting a wide audience in the medical field.

news.headline: Agree Realty Corp (NYSE: ADC) to release Q1 2025 results on April 22 after market close. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: Royal Oak, Michigan - Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) has revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 operating results on April 22, 2025, following the market close. The company will host a conference call to review its performance.

news.headline: Integer Holdings Corporation allows conversion of its 2.125% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 starting April 1 until June 30, 2025.
news.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation, a prominent medical device contract development and manufacturing organization based in Plano, Texas, has announced that holders of its 2.125% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028, with the trading symbol NYSE: ITGR, can exercise the Conversion Option from April 1, 2025, until June 30, 2025. The Notes are convertible into cash up to their principal amount, with the remaining balance being payable in cash, shares of the Company’s common stock, or a combination of both, as determined by Integer. Future convertibility of the Notes will be subject to the terms of the governing Indenture.

news.headline: Huntington Bancshares Inc. (Nasdaq: HBAN) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 17; info to be released prior.
news.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) from Columbus, Ohio, is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, April 17, 2025. The report will be issued before the market opens, providing insights into the company's performance. Interested parties can access the news release and accompanying financial data to gain a comprehensive understanding of Huntington Bancshares' status. This update will offer valuable information to investors, analysts, and the public regarding the company's financial health.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable to discuss First Quarter 2025 results on May 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC.
news.summary: Brookfield Renewable, a leading renewable energy company (NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC), is scheduled to host its First Quarter 2025 Conference Call and Webcast on Friday, May 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. During the call, the company will review its performance and key business strategies.

news.headline: Tarkett introduces 3 collections for educational spaces to enhance learning environment joyfully.
news.summary: In Solon, Ohio on April 2, 2025, Tarkett, a global leader in eco-friendly flooring solutions, has unveiled a range of collections designed to enhance educational environments. These collections aim to create ideal spaces for learning by encouraging happiness and creativity, as well as fostering tranquility and concentration. The company's new releases feature a variety of options specially crafted to cater to the diverse needs of educational settings.

news.headline: Akebia Therapeutics granted 8 new employees options to purchase 73,325 shares of common stock on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on April 02, 2025, Akebia Therapeutics®, Inc. (Nasdaq: AKBA), a biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to improving the quality of life for those affected by kidney disease, provided eight new employees with options to buy a total of 73,325 shares of Akebia’s common stock on March 31, 2025. These options were offered as incentives for each new employee joining Akebia. The allocation of options followed the guidelines outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Lucid Group plans to offer $1 billion in convertible senior notes due 2030 in private offering.
news.summary: In Newark, California, on April 2, 2025, Lucid Group, Inc. revealed plans to potentially issue $1 billion in convertible senior notes due 2030 through a private offering, pending market factors and other circumstances. The notes would be available to eligible individuals. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol LCID.

news.headline: FibroGen to attend 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 7-10, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, FibroGen, Inc. (NASDAQ: FGEN) revealed its participation in the 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference scheduled for April 7-10, 2025, in San Francisco.

news.headline: Resmed's third quarter fiscal 2025 earnings to be reported on April 23, 2025 after NYSE closes. Webcast to discuss results.
news.summary: San Diego-based company Resmed revealed their intention to unveil the financial and operational outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 on April 23, 2025, subsequent to the New York Stock Exchange closing. The results will be disclosed after this event, with Resmed management organizing a webcast to deliberate on the findings. The webcast may also involve conversations around additional forward-looking and significant information. Resmed is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the tickers RMD and RMD on the Australian Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Stephanie Pugliese appointed as President & CEO of Duluth Holdings Inc. effective May 5, 2025. NASDAQ: DLTH.
news.summary: A new announcement coming from Mount Horeb, Wisconsin reveals that Duluth Holdings Inc., popularly known as Duluth Trading Company, has appointed Stephanie Pugliese as the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with her induction as a Board of Directors member. This transition will officially take place on May 5, 2025, solidifying Pugliese's position in leading the lifestyle brand specializing in men’s and women’s workwear, casual wear, outdoor apparel, and accessories. Duluth Trading, listed on NASDAQ as DLTH, aims to leverage Pugliese's expertise for continued growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. is paying a monthly distribution of $0.1025/share to stockholders in April 2025.
news.summary: In Miami on April 2, 2025, PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. announced a monthly distribution for April 2025 of $0.1025 per share for stockholders of record as of April 15, 2025, with the payment scheduled for May 1, 2025. This distribution is anticipated to be sourced from taxable net investment income. The company will provide stockholders with the precise tax details of the distribution via Form 1099 post the calendar year's conclusion and in the periodic report submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission. PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. is listed on the NYSE as PFLT.

news.headline: CTR Investments & Consulting Inc. acquires Shibue Couture Inc., a California corporation, in a recent transaction.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, CTR Investments & Consulting, Inc. (OTC Pink: CIVX) based in Palm Desert, California, successfully completed the acquisition of Shibue Couture, Inc., a California corporation. This acquisition marks a significant move for CTR Investments & Consulting, Inc. and demonstrates its growth strategy in expanding its portfolio. The details of the transaction, including the financial figures involved, were not disclosed in the announcement. This strategic acquisition is expected to strengthen CTR Investments & Consulting, Inc.'s position in the market and contribute to its future development and success.

news.headline: ImmuCell begins Investigational Product use of Re-Tain®, improving animal health and productivity. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, on April 2, 2025, ImmuCell Corporation (Nasdaq: ICCC), a leading animal health company specializing in enhancing the health and productivity of dairy and beef cattle, has unveiled the commencement of Investigational Product use for Re-Tain®. Promising scientifically-backed products are at the core of ImmuCell's operations, aimed at advancing the well-being and efficiency of livestock.

news.headline: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals reported financial results, focusing on plogosertib, with pro forma cash at $7.2M, expenses down, and new board appointments.
news.summary: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has reported its fourth-quarter financial results and business update. The company is focusing on developing plogosertib, a PLK 1 inhibitor for advanced cancers and hematological malignancies. They acquired it from their subsidiary and anticipate decreased research expenses resulting from the subsidiary's liquidation, intending to increase stockholder equity by $5.0 million. As of Dec 31, 2024, their pro forma cash was $7.2 million, with total expenses lowered, and available cash expected to last into Q2 of 2025. The net loss for Dec 31, 2024, was $3.0 million compared to $5.3 million in 2023. New appointments to the board include Ms. Inigo Angel Laurduraj and Dr. Satis Waran Nair Krishnan as independent directors. The company is developing innovative cancer medicines and optimizing its strategy. For detailed financial statements, visit their website.

news.headline: Luxshare-Tech & Semtech introduce 1.6T Active Copper Cable at OFC 2025, with 224G/lane linear equalizer/redriver ICs.
news.summary: In San Francisco at OFC 2025, Luxshare-Tech, a top provider of high-performance interconnect solutions, partnered with Semtech, a leading supplier of high-performance semiconductors, IoT systems, and cloud connectivity services, to introduce the 1.6T OSFP Active Copper Cable (ACC). This cutting-edge product is supported by Semtech's innovative CopperEdge™ technology. The Luxshare-Tech 1.6T OSFP ACC, now available, integrates Semtech's 224G/lane linear equalizer/redriver ICs to deliver top-notch performance.

news.headline: ClearSign Technologies Corporation achieves record revenues of $3.6 million in 2024 with 50.3M shares outstanding. Strategic collaborations and growth plans outlined.
news.summary: ClearSign Technologies Corporation reported record annual revenue of $3.6 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to $2.4 million in 2023, largely attributed to a significant order for 20 process burners from a California refinery. The company also launched a co-branded burner product line with Zeeco and received orders for projects in Texas, a Gulf Coast facility, and from power generation companies in Oklahoma and Missouri. As of December 31, 2024, the company had approximately $14 million in cash and 50,285,509 shares issued. The company focuses on developing technologies for decarbonization and industrial system improvements. They will host a conference call for investors and have outlined cautionary statements regarding forward-looking projections.

news.headline: Expedia (NASDAQ: EXPE) to webcast Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025; release post market close and webcast at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET.
news.summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The report will be released on Thursday, May 8, 2025, through an earnings release and webcast. Investors can access these documents on the company's official website at http://ir.expediagroup.com. The earnings release will be published after the close of the market, with the webcast scheduled to start at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time. A replay of the call will also be available for those who miss the live event.

news.headline: Enliven Therapeutics will present 5 posters at 2025 AACR Annual Meeting. Company focused on small molecule therapeutics.
news.summary: Enliven Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in Boulder, Colorado, disclosed that they will be showcasing five posters at an upcoming event. The company, listed as ELVN on Nasdaq, specializes in small molecule therapeutics. This news was released on April 2, 2025, and signifies a significant step for Enliven as they continue their work in the pharmaceutical sector.
